title: Subadult Virtual Anthropology Database (SVAD) Data Collection Protocol: Odontometrics
author: Pilloud, Marin A
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document presents the standardized protocol for taking crown and cervical measurements on virtual 3D renderings of permanent and deciduous teeth using the Amira visualization software. This protocol was developed as part of National Institute of Justice Award 2019 DU-BX-0039.
steps_raw: This document presents the standardized protocol for taking crown and cervical measurements on virtual 3D renderings of permanent and deciduous teeth using the Amira visualization software. This protocol was developed as part of National Institute of Justice Award 2019 DU-BX-0039.
